case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. DIANA D. WILSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE PER CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC
DECLARATION EMILY PIERCE FILED RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC
DECLARATION JOHNNY TABOR FILED RE: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585), COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550) AND INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED JAN-04-2013, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED MAY-31-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D. $10,241.44 PRINCIPAL, $1,302.00 INTEREST, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,968.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $425.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 200026767) FILED BY ATTORNEY PIERCE, EMILY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 200032100) AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DIANA D. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2012
